title: Intensely Crispy Kenyan Sugarcane Skewers
description: A crispy and bitter Kenyan dish featuring sugarcane, perfect for the monsoon season, this recipe is dairy-free friendly and incorporates spherification for a unique texture.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the cornstarch, salt, and bitter melon powder.
Add the sugarcane pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the cornstarch mixture.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Fry the sugarcane pieces in batches until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per batch.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fried sugarcane from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
In a small bowl, mix the sodium alginate and water to create a spherification bath.
Add the fried sugarcane pieces to the spherification bath and let sit for 30 seconds to create a crispy exterior.
Remove the sugarcane pieces from the bath and place on a serving plate.
Drizzle the lemon juice over the sugarcane pieces and serve immediately.
